previousECrouchTPoseCause: The source Mixamo FBX targets mixamorig9-prefixed bones. Socrates_MotusRig uses Motus bone names without that prefix, so a raw/source-style E clip has zero direct track target matches and cannot bind to Socrates in Three.js.
